plans.description: Orders filtered by date range and sorted descending
plans.sql: SELECT id, date, total FROM orders WHERE date >= ? AND date <= ? ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 100
plan_details: SEARCH orders USING INDEX ix_orders_date (date>? AND date<?)

plans.description: Orders search by order number text pattern
plans.sql: SELECT id, order_number, date FROM orders WHERE CAST(order_number AS TEXT) LIKE ? ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 100

plans.description: Product search by name wildcard and category filter
plans.sql: SELECT id, name, category_id FROM products WHERE name LIKE ? AND (? IS NULL OR category_id = ?) ORDER BY name LIMIT 100

plans.description: Debtors unpaid filter sorted by created_at desc
plans.sql: SELECT id, created_at FROM debtors WHERE paid_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
plan_details: USE TEMP B-TREE FOR ORDER BY

plans.description: Debtors paid filter sorted by created_at desc
plans.sql: SELECT id, created_at FROM debtors WHERE paid_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

plans.description: Activity logs filtered by user and date range
plans.sql: SELECT id, timestamp FROM activity_log WHERE (? IS NULL OR user_id = ?) AND timestamp >= ? AND timestamp <= ? ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
plan_details: SEARCH activity_log USING INDEX ix_activity_log_timestamp (timestamp>? AND timestamp<?)

plans.description: Register balance source scan used by current service path
Register balance SQL aggregate candidate for future optimization
plans.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type IN ('sale', 'deposit') THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type IN ('withdrawal', 'shift_close') THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM cash_transactions

plans.description: Server-side daily breakdown candidate replacing client aggregation
plans.sql: SELECT substr(date, 1, 10) AS day, COUNT(*) AS orders_count, SUM(total) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE date >= ? AND date <= ? GROUP BY day ORDER BY day ASC
plan_details: SEARCH orders USING INDEX ix_orders_date (date>? AND date<?)
USE TEMP B-TREE FOR GROUP BY
